repos.name: tirth8205/code-review-graph
repos.desc: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

repos.name: 1jehuang/jcode
repos.desc: The most intelligent agent harness for code

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.desc: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
repos.desc: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
repos.desc: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.desc: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

repos.name: topoteretes/cognee
repos.desc: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

repos.name: Robbyant/lingbot-map
repos.desc: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

repos.name: every-app/open-seo
repos.desc: Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

repos.name: MoonshotAI/kimi-cli
repos.desc: Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

repos.name: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
repos.desc: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

repos.name: PrefectHQ/fastmcp
repos.desc: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

repos.name: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
repos.desc: The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

repos.name: tokio-rs/topcoat
repos.desc: A batteries-included framework for building web apps

repos.name: iptv-org/iptv
repos.desc: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

repos.name: oblien/openship
repos.desc: Self-hosted deployment platform

repos.name: microsoft/Ontology-Playground
repos.desc: Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

repos.name: handy-computer/transcribe.cpp
repos.desc: ggml speech-to-text inference for 16+ model families

repos.name: moonshine-ai/moonshine
repos.desc: Very low latency speech to text, intent recognition, and text to speech, for building voice agents and interfaces

# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：code-review-graph 爆火，Python 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-07-21  |  🔍 共收录 20 个热门项目

又到了一天一度的「看看别人在卷什么」环节。准备好你的 star 键，Let's go 🚀

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 8 | **TypeScript**: 7 | **Rust**: 2 | **C++**: 2 | **Shell**: 1
